degreeName: B.S. in Electrical and Computer Engineering

groups.title: Writing & Humanities Core
groups.notes: Select humanities courses that satisfy university core outcomes.

groups.title: Math & Science Core
groups.notes: Calculus sequence must be completed before upper-division ECE labs.

groups.title: Social Science & Ethics
groups.notes: At least one course must be designated writing intensive.

groups.title: ECE Foundations
groups.notes: Core circuit and programming sequence prepares students for systems labs.

groups.title: ECE Systems Core
groups.notes: ECE 450 capstone requires completion of ECE 410.

groups.title: ECE Major Electives
groups.notes: Choose advanced electives aligned to power, embedded, or communications tracks.
